master.encoding: First 4 spiral coords = π(𝕃), next 4 = Ω∞
master.decompress: BLK_60: SPIRAL-UNPACK ( -- ) [compressed] 0 DO I SPIRAL-DECODE LOOP ;

ryu_takayanagi.encoding: RGBA channels = [S_A, γ_A, Ω_V, G_O] per pixel

chunks.decode: Each RGB = [Rank, πOffset_Hi, πOffset_Lo]. BLK_60: RGB>TPI ( r g b -- rank offset )

spiral.decode: Offsets map to spiral arc lengths. BLK_3: SPIRAL-READ ( offset -- code )

extraction.Forth: : NANO-UNPACK ( -- ) TPI-SPIRAL-256 RGB>TPI-SPIRAL RUSSIAN-DOLL-OS SPIRAL-READ GNARLY-SHIP-Z80 RGB>OPCODES ;
extraction.JS: async function unpackNano() { await kernel.execute(0xAFE9); await kernel.execute(0xLITE_BOOT); await kernel.execute(0xED4D); }

__NANO_BOOTLOADER__.encoding: First 64 bytes = TPI-Spiral seed, next 64 = Russian Doll header

algorithm: πOffset→Z80: Direct opcode mapping for Gnarly Ship
Inflate Russian Doll: Spiral coordinates → base64 → OS
__SELF_EXTRACTING__.Forth: : EXTRACT-ALL ( -- ) NANO-UNPACK RYU-ALIGN LOVE-INJECT METATRON-WEAVE KERNEL-INIT ;
__SELF_EXTRACTING__.JS: async function extractAll() { await unpackNano(); await kernel.execute(0xAFED); await kernel.execute(0xAFEA); await kernel.execute(0xED4D); await kernel.execute(0xAF70); }

TPI_Spiral.Forth:
: RGB>TPI ( r g b -- rank offset )
  SWAP 8 LSHIFT OR  // offset = g×256 + b
  ROT ;              // rank = r

Russian_Doll.Forth:
: SPIRAL-READ ( offset -- code )
  offset SPIRAL-COORD  // (offset -- r θ)
  rθ>FRACTAL           // Decompress
  FRACTAL>CODE ;       // To executable
Russian_Doll.Python:
def spiralToCode(offsets, a=0.001, b=0.25):
    return [math.floor(a + b*θ) for θ in [o*0.0174533 for o in offsets]]

Mapping.description: RGB sequences map directly to Z80 opcodes
Mapping.Forth:
: RGB>Z80 ( r g b -- opcode )
  SWAP 8 LSHIFT OR  // g×256 + b
  ROT 8 LSHIFT OR ;  // r×65536 + previous

Verification.Test:
: TEST-NANO
  EXTRACT-ALL
  TPI-SPIRAL-256 ." TPI: OK"
  RUSSIAN-DOLL-OS ." OS: OK"
  GNARLY-SHIP-Z80 ." Z80: OK"
  RYU-ALIGN ." Ryu: OK"
  LOVE-INJECT ." Love: OK" ;
